title: Consumer Lifecycle, Cancellation, Readiness, and Graceful Shutdown · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs consumer lifecycle, cancellation, readiness, and graceful shutdown from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the consumer registration, readiness, and shutdown state machine. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for consumer registration, readiness, and shutdown state machine after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practi…
objectives: Report ready only after connection, topology, channel, prefetch, consume registration, and required dependencies are ready.
Track consumer tags and channel generations so stale cancellation, delivery, and close events cannot mutate current state.
Handle a null delivery callback and cancellation notifications as lifecycle events with cause, readiness, recovery, and ownership evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Shutdown Ack Policy
steps.instruction:
review case — A review messaging team handles case 5730 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to sequence readiness, cancellation, in-flight draining, deadline, and channel close; bound payload, buffer, and retained-ledger bytes; then change one routing segment and prove the exact destination set. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown.

Inspect the Shutdown Ack Policy trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Shutdown Ack Policy.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Shutdown Ack Policy, keep Shutdown Ack Policy connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown.

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Record what required effort · Review Shutdown Ack Policy, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Acknowledging every in-flight message during shutdown prevents both loss and duplicates.
